dependencies: Dependence on agricultural commodity availability affected by weather, farmer decisions, government policies
Reliance on third-party transportation services including ocean vessels, river barges, rail, and truck
Dependence on energy commodities including electricity, natural gas, coal, and fuel oil
Reliance on third-party suppliers for raw materials procurement
risks: Adverse weather conditions and climate change impacts on commodity availability and quality
Supply and demand imbalances in agricultural commodities
Disruptions in transportation services due to weather or other factors
Counterparty non-performance risk on forward purchase and sale contracts
Dependence on third parties for logistics, warehousing, and transportation
Operational risks including industrial accidents, natural disasters, pandemics, wars, and cybersecurity incidents

regulatory_risks: Facility licensing and permitting requirements
Food and feed safety regulations
Nutritional and labeling requirements
Global trade compliance including tariffs and export restrictions
Environmental regulations including GHG emissions and carbon pricing programs
Land-use restrictions in protected areas and forestry reserve requirements
Water use limitations
EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) requiring proof of deforestation-free commodities
Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) and European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS)
Swiss law non-financial reporting requirements including climate, social, human rights, and anti-corruption matters
Swiss Code of Obligations due diligence requirements on child labor in supply chain
California Climate-Related Financial Risk Act and Climate Corporate Data Accountability Act
OECD Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS) initiative and global minimum tax requirements
Antitrust and competition laws scrutiny
Financial markets regulation affecting risk management practices
Price controls, tariffs, export restrictions imposed by governments
Biofuels mandates and incentives
Changes in tax laws and regulations across multiple jurisdictions
Income tax examinations and assessments in various countries
Data privacy and data protection regulations
ESG disclosure frameworks and sustainability reporting requirements

sanction_risks: Economic sanctions imposed on Russia in connection with Ukraine-Russia war
Risk of retaliatory tariffs between US and China affecting agricultural products
Embargoes and sanctions restricting sales to specific persons or countries
Potential for increased sanctions or trade restrictions affecting operations
